rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft In Bybliotheca Vaticana Firmin-Didot et C<sup>ie</sup>, éditeurs, Akademie der Wissenschaften in Hamburg

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Excerpts from Mazmura Dāwit to be recited before the readings in various feasts of the liturgical calendar
Tones in which psalms and litanies are sung.
For the fruits of the earth
For the water of the rivers
Tones in which canticles, biblical passages, praises to Our Lady Mary and ʾAnqaṣa bǝrhān are sung.
Excerpts from the Mazmura Dāwit: Pss from 1 to 10.
Excerpts from the Mazmura Dāwit: Pss from 11 to 20.
Excerpts from the Mazmura Dāwit: Pss from 21 to 30.
Excerpts from the Mazmura Dāwit: Pss from 31 to 40.
Excerpts from the Mazmura Dāwit: Pss from 41 to 50.
Excerpts from the Mazmura Dāwit: Pss from 51 to 60.
Excerpts from the Mazmura Dāwit: Pss from 61 to 70.
Excerpts from the Mazmura Dāwit: Pss from 71 to 80.
Excerpts from the Mazmura Dāwit: Pss from 81 to 90.
Excerpts from the Mazmura Dāwit: Pss from 91 to 100. The text terminates abruptly.
